case_title: ARTHUR M. TOM, III VS. MICHAEL A. WAUL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-20-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-20-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOM, III, ARTHUR M.
